TermsOfPurchasing.t_8: By submitting a paid order, you enter into a legally binding purchase contract with
TermsOfPurchasing.t_10: Once we have received your order, an automated confirmation will be sent to the email address provided. Please ensure the email address is correct. We do not enter into binding agreements with individuals who lack legal capacity (minors) without consent from legal guardians.
TermsOfPurchasing.t_11: We reserve the right to reject or cancel orders containing inappropriate content, including pornographic, racist, or extremist content.
TermsOfPurchasing.t_12: The customer is responsible for ensuring their designs do not violate any applicable laws or third-party rights (e.g., trademarks).
TermsOfPurchasing.t_14: All prices on our website are shown in Euro (€).
TermsOfPurchasing.t_16: According to § 19 UStG (German Value Added Tax Act), we operate as a small business (Kleinunternehmer). Therefore, we do not charge VAT (Umsatzsteuer), and VAT is not displayed on our invoices.
TermsOfPurchasing.t_17: 'All prices are final prices plus shipping costs. No VAT is charged in accordance with § 19 UStG.'
TermsOfPurchasing.t_18: Shipping costs are clearly displayed in the cart and during the final step of checkout. We reserve the right to adjust prices for future orders without prior notice.
TermsOfPurchasing.t_23: Depending on the dimensions and weight of the order, delivery is made by parcel or registered mail.
TermsOfPurchasing.t_25: We strive to meet stated delivery times. However, delays may occur due to circumstances beyond our control. If a delay exceeds 30 days, you have the statutory right to cancel your order.
TermsOfPurchasing.t_27: For consumers (private individuals), the risk of loss or damage during transport lies with SignXpert until the goods are delivered to you. For business customers, the risk transfers to the customer once the goods are handed over to the carrier (UPS or DHL).
TermsOfPurchasing.t_29: Exclusion of the Right of Withdrawal:
TermsOfPurchasing.t_30: According to § 312g para. 2 no. 1 BGB (German Civil Code), the right of withdrawal (right to return)
TermsOfPurchasing.t_32: to contracts for the delivery of goods that are not prefabricated and for whose production an individual selection or determination by the consumer is decisive, or which are clearly tailored to the personal needs of the consumer (custom-made signs).
TermsOfPurchasing.t_33: Since our products are manufactured according to your individual specifications,
TermsOfPurchasing.t_34: cancellation or return is not possible
TermsOfPurchasing.t_35: once production has started or after the items have been delivered.

TermsOfPurchasing.t_39: If you are unhappy with your product, please contact us. We will first attempt to provide a replacement. If the issue cannot be resolved, we will issue a credit or refund.
TermsOfPurchasing.t_40: This guarantee applies for 30 days from delivery and does not limit your statutory warranty rights.
TermsOfPurchasing.t_42: Statutory warranty rights apply to all products. Additionally, SignXpert provides a 1-year warranty on product durability and function.
TermsOfPurchasing.t_44: Orders are confirmed upon completion of the checkout process. We offer the following payment methods via
TermsOfPurchasing.t_47: Securely processed via Stripe. Your data is encrypted (SSL) and sent directly to the payment provider.
TermsOfPurchasing.t_49: Orders enter production once payment has been received on our Sparkasse account.
TermsOfPurchasing.t_51: We process your personal data (name, address, email) to fulfill your order and manage customer service. All processing is compliant with the GDPR (DSGVO) and the German BDSG. For full details, please refer to our Privacy Policy.
TermsOfPurchasing.t_53: Please inspect your shipment upon arrival. If the product is damaged during transport or is defective:
TermsOfPurchasing.t_55: Provide your order number, a description of the defect, and a photo
TermsOfPurchasing.t_56: If the complaint is accepted, we will repair, replace, or refund the item at our expense.

privacy-policy.description_1: Your trust is important to us. To ensure you feel confident when visiting our website, we comply with all legal requirements of Germany and the EU regarding the processing of personal data (GDPR/DSGVO, BDSG, TDDDG). Below you'll find information about how we collect, manage, and use your data.
privacy-policy.description_4: The responsible party for the collection, processing, and use of personal data is the owner of the
privacy-policy.description_9: Kostyantyn Utvenko, SignXpert Baumwiesen 2 72401 Haigerloch Germany
privacy-policy.description_11: 2. Collection, Processing, and Use of Personal Data
privacy-policy.description_12: We are personally responsible for the information you share with us. Personal data refers to any information that can be traced back to an identifiable person. We collect and process your information to handle your orders. Data is only shared with third parties when permitted by law (e.g., for logistics or payment processing).
privacy-policy.description_14: In accordance with German commercial and tax laws
privacy-policy.description_18: we store customer and order information, including accounting documents and invoices, for
privacy-policy.description_20: 2.1 Registration of Customer Account and Ordering
privacy-policy.description_21: To fulfill our contractual obligations (Art. 6 para. 1 lit. b GDPR), the following information must be provided when creating an account or placing an order:
privacy-policy.description_27: Your phone number (used only for delivery notifications and logistics coordination)
privacy-policy.description_30: When you design a sign, we save the content you add to process your order. We never share sign content with third parties for marketing purposes.
privacy-policy.description_32: We use modern encryption standards to ensure the security of your transactions.
privacy-policy.description_34: Card payments and other online methods are handled by the payment provider
privacy-policy.description_36: Your full card details are sent directly to Stripe. We only have access to the cardholder's name, card type, last 4 digits, and transaction details to process refunds.
privacy-policy.description_38: For direct bank transfers (e.g., payment by invoice or prepayment), your payment data (name, IBAN, amount) is processed through our bank,
privacy-policy.description_41: Payments via PayPal are subject to PayPal's own privacy policy. We receive only the information necessary to identify the payment.
privacy-policy.description_43: Your email address is used to send news and offers only if you have provided explicit consent. You can unsubscribe at any time via the link in the email or through your account settings.
privacy-policy.description_45: We reserve the right to perform a credit check before manufacturing or delivering your order. For this purpose, necessary data may be transferred to credit reporting agencies (e.g., SCHUFA).
privacy-policy.description_46: 4. Transfer of Data to Third Countries
privacy-policy.description_47: We strive to process all data within the EU/EEA. When using global services (e.g., Stripe), data may be transferred to countries outside the EEA. In such cases, we ensure a level of protection comparable to EU standards through Standard Contractual Clauses (SCC).
privacy-policy.description_49: Under the GDPR, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
privacy-policy.description_51: You have the right to request information about your stored data and receive a copy (Art. 15 GDPR).
privacy-policy.description_53: You have the right to request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data (Art. 16 GDPR).
privacy-policy.description_55: You have the right to request the deletion of your data, provided legal retention periods (like the 10-year tax record requirement) do not apply (Art. 17 GDPR).
privacy-policy.description_57: You have the right to request the restriction of processing under certain conditions (Art. 18 GDPR).
privacy-policy.description_59: You have the right to receive your data in a structured, commonly used format (Art. 20 GDPR).
privacy-policy.description_61: You have the right to object to the processing of your data based on legitimate interests or for direct marketing purposes (Art. 21 GDPR).
privacy-policy.description_63: You may withdraw your consent for marketing at any time via the unsubscribe link in our emails or your account settings.
privacy-policy.description_65: In accordance with Art. 77 GDPR, you have the right to lodge a complaint with a competent data protection supervisory authority if you believe that the processing of your personal data violates the GDPR.
privacy-policy.description_66: Der Landesbeauftragte für den Datenschutz und die Informationsfreiheit Baden-Württemberg

privacy-policy.description_72: Date and time of access, page name, IP address, data volume, and browser version.
privacy-policy.description_73: These files are used exclusively to ensure technical security and fix errors. They are accessible only to developers and are automatically deleted after
privacy-policy.description_75: No passwords or sensitive payment details are logged.
privacy-policy.description_77: Your personal information is securely transmitted using
privacy-policy.description_78: encryption. This applies to ordering, payment, and customer login. We continuously update our systems to protect your data from unauthorized access or loss.
privacy-policy.description_80: We use cookies to improve your experience in accordance with the
privacy-policy.description_81: and Art. 6 para. 1 lit. f GDPR.
privacy-policy.description_83: Required for the website to function (e.g., shopping cart).
privacy-policy.description_88: You can change your preferences or withdraw consent at any time by clicking the Cookie Settings link at the bottom of any page on the website.

HomePlaceholder.h_1: From design to delivery - your sign
HomePlaceholder.h_5: We produce durable engraved signs and nameplates from high-quality plastic for Industry, energy, and business sectors.
HomePlaceholder.h_10: In today's market, we know that budget matters.
HomePlaceholder.h_11: SignXpert provides high-quality signs and fast production at competitive rates - professional results without overpaying.
HomePlaceholder.h_13: The more you order, the lower the price.
HomePlaceholder.h_14: Our transparent discount system automatically reduces costs as your volume grows - the smart way to save.
HomePlaceholder.h_18: We strive to offer you the best prices, which is why we've introduced a volume discount system:
HomePlaceholder.h_19: the higher your order amount, the lower the price.
HomePlaceholder.h_20: The discount applies to the current project only (not cumulative) and is calculated automatically:
HomePlaceholder.h_27: Discount applies to the current project only and does not include accessories.
HomePlaceholder.h_31: Design professional engraved plastic signs, labels and nameplates in minutes with
HomePlaceholder.h_34: you can create fully customized signs for:
HomePlaceholder.h_39: — exactly the way you need them.
HomePlaceholder.h_40: Whether you need one sign or a large batch, SignXpert delivers reliable quality and fast production.
HomePlaceholder.h_44: we combine modern production technology with an efficient online ordering system to provide fast delivery.
HomePlaceholder.h_46: reliable shipping across Germany and Europe
HomePlaceholder.h_48: This allows businesses and professionals to receive their custom engraved signs quickly and reliably.
HomePlaceholder.h_51: All SignXpert products are manufactured from high-quality two-layer engraving plastic.
HomePlaceholder.h_52: During laser engraving, the top layer is engraved to reveal the contrasting color underneath. This ensures permanent, high-contrast markings that remain readable for years.
HomePlaceholder.h_55: Professional solutions for Industry and Business

Products.p_4: we produce high-quality engraved plastic signs, nameplates and industrial labels using durable two-layer engraving plastic.
Products.p_5: Our engraved signs provide clear, permanent and professional identification for machines, electrical installations, offices, buildings and workplaces.
Products.p_6: Using precision laser engraving, the top layer of the plastic is engraved to reveal the contrasting color layer underneath. This creates high-contrast markings that remain readable for years, even in demanding industrial environments.
Products.p_7: Our engraved plastic signs are widely used in:
Products.p_15: Our engraved plastic signs are manufactured from high-quality two-layer plastic designed for technical and industrial applications.
Products.p_16: Because the text is engraved into the material, it will not fade, peel or wear off like printed labels.
Products.p_18: Versatile use for industrial and office environments
Products.p_20: UV-resistant material suitable for outdoor use
Products.p_21: Large format options: up to 600 x 295 mm
Products.p_29: creating a custom engraved sign is simple and fast.
Products.p_30: You can design your sign directly in your browser and see every change instantly.
Products.p_32: choose your sign size and layout
Products.p_34: add mounting holes or adhesive backing
Products.p_35: preview your sign in real time
Products.p_36: This makes it easy to create professional engraved labels, machine nameplates and technical signs in just a few minutes.
Products.p_38: Signs can also be ordered via phone or email, and our team will help you prepare the design if needed.
Products.p_41: At SignXpert, every engraved sign can be customized to your needs.
Products.p_42: Whether you need a single sign or large production batches, we provide reliable quality and precise engraving.
Products.p_43: You can design your sign directly in our online sign editor, upload your own files or contact us with your requirements.
Products.p_44: Our goal is to provide durable, professional and easy-to-order engraved plastic signs for industry and businesses.
